title: poa × gaspensis
intro: Poa × gaspensis, also known as the Gaspé fescue, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Poa × gaspensis include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Poa × gaspensis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
